steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The phrase “Because he paid close attention to all the details of his Harlem neighborhood” shows that Lawrence’s artistic process relied on noticing fine details.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
Observant means paying close attention to details, which fits the clue exactly.
The other three choices—skeptical, critical, and confident—do not convey this idea of attentiveness.
B is correct.
